title: Phemiss Low Port
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Map_of_Phemiss.png|thumb|right|250px|The Phemiss Low Port was located in the city of Phemiss.]]
'''Phemiss Low Port''' was the largest of the three [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceports]] in [[Phemiss]] on [[New Plympto/Legends|New Plympto]]. It was surrounded by a shantytown of outcast beggars. The spaceport was located in the city's [[Drifters' district]].<ref name="CatCW">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-01-XX -->''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''
